description_long: This is a large, heavily armored military tank with a robust, angular chassis and a prominent, elongated main cannon mounted on a rotating turret. The vehicle features dual wide tracks on either side, providing stability and traction for urban and rugged environments. Its exterior is covered in green and black camouflage with metallic accents, and the surface shows reinforced armor plating with visible bolts and seams. The turret is equipped with a large-caliber barrel and additional hatches, with a visible insignia on the side. The tank's design includes multiple access panels, exhaust vents, and what appear to be observation ports or sensors. The overall build suggests a focus on durability, firepower, and crew protection.
description: A large, green-camouflaged military tank with a long main cannon, dual tracks, and heavy armor plating. Features include a rotating turret, visible insignia, and reinforced exterior.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wide, angular armored hull, dual tracks, and the base of the turret with the cannon facing forward.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the full length of the main cannon, the side armor, insignia, and the detailed tread system.
description_view_2: Rear-front view displaying the back of the hull, exhaust vents, and the rear section of the tracks.
description_view_3: Right side view mirroring the left, with the cannon extended, visible insignia, and detailed track and armor features.
attribute_weapon_mounts: One large main cannon mounted on the central turret; no additional weapon mounts visible.
attribute_armor_plating: Full body coverage with thick, angular armor plating; reinforced sections on the front, sides, and turret; visible seams and bolts suggest modular construction.
attribute_camouflage_pattern: Woodland camouflage pattern with irregular green, black, and gray shapes; matte finish.
attribute_military_markings: White eagle insignia on the side of the turret; no other visible numbers or symbols.
